questions.question: What does CMOS primarily refer to in the context of integrated circuit technology?
options: Complementary Metal-Oxide-Semiconductor
Central Memory Operating System
Current Mode Output Stage
Charged Memory Optimization Standard
Complex Micro-Oscillator System

questions.question: In the physical design phase of digital ICs, what is the primary objective of Clock Tree Synthesis (CTS)?
options: To convert the Register Transfer Level (RTL) design into a gate-level netlist.
To automatically generate the power and ground routing networks for the chip.
To ensure that all sequential elements receive the clock signal simultaneously and with minimal skew, enabling correct timing operation.
To reduce the total number of transistors in the design for lower power consumption.
To determine the optimal placement of I/O pins on the chip package.

questions.question: Amdahl's Law is a fundamental principle in computer architecture. What does it primarily describe?
options: The maximum theoretical speedup achievable by a system when only a portion of its workload can be parallelized.
The exponential growth in the number of transistors on integrated circuits over time.
The relationship between a processor's clock frequency and its dynamic power consumption.
The average time required to access data from different levels of the memory hierarchy.
The reduction in manufacturing cost per transistor with increasing wafer size.

questions.question: In advanced semiconductor manufacturing, variations in manufacturing processes can lead to significant differences in device characteristics. To ensure robust operation across these inherent physical variations, along with fluctuations in voltage and temperature, IC designers primarily rely on which verification strategy?
options: Performing extensive Register Transfer Level (RTL) functional simulations.
Conducting Static Timing Analysis (STA) across multiple Process-Voltage-Temperature (PVT) corners.
Applying formal verification techniques to prove design correctness.
Utilizing High-Level Synthesis (HLS) to generate optimized RTL.
Implementing Design-for-Test (DFT) structures like scan chains.

questions.question: Which of the following digital logic components selects one of several input data lines and routes it to a single output line, based on the value of its select input lines?
options: Decoder
Encoder
Multiplexer
Demultiplexer
Full Adder
